user_task_description: Clean the contract schedule draft while preserving the listed clauses and schedule values.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove the visible Draft: prefixes, restore the exact section order, refresh the table of contents, keep the schedule table values unchanged, normalize body style, and make the Appendix start on a fresh page.
atomic_scope: Only the bounded document-wide edits and structural changes explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document that completes the requested single-document workflow.

notes.Task Notes: - Preserve unrelated content unless the task explicitly requires a change

required_paragraphs: This draft consolidates the schedule and clause structure.
Subsections now appear in logical order.
The schedule note resolves the timing conflict between teams.
Appendix includes the updated signoff list.
forbidden_paragraphs: Draft: Remove this scratch section before publication.
Draft: Internal reviewer notes must not remain in the released file.
